## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant automated tests pass.
- [ ] Hardware-dependent behavior was tested on a device, or is marked not applicable.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog impact were considered.
- [ ] No credentials, private models, impulse responses, or other restricted assets are included.

## Security impact

Describe changes to authentication, network exposure, file handling, dependencies, firmware, or update/release behavior. Write `None` if there is no security impact.
